untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition for 'broadening formation' requires visual identification of dual trend lines (upper and lower), minor highs/lows, and trend line touches. These geometric pattern elements cannot be precisely expressed using only price-based technical indicators and the allowed operators. The signal requires detection of: (1) diverging trend lines, (2) specific touch points on those lines, and (3) price turns at trend lines. A complete implementation would need pattern detection logic beyond simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using price reversals (long entry when low > prev_low at lower trend line, short entry when high < prev_high at upper trend line) with exits on reversal. Stop-loss set to 0.15 as specified. However, the core broadening formation pattern recognition cannot be fully captured without access to trend line detection or pattern recognition libraries.
